# DocSmith for Ansible `example-role-nested-options` README (for testing)

**This is a mock Ansible role intended for testing purposes only and is not a fully functional role.**

Its `argument_specs.yml` defines nested options (dict attributes) which `ansible-docsmith` documents in the README as well as in the comments of entry-point files like `defaults/main.yml` (issue #21).

This line will be replaced as it is between the markers! Any content between them is maintained by `ansible-docsmith`.
